title: lathyrus gorgoni subsp. tiriopolitanus
intro: Lathyrus gorgoni subsp. tiriopolitanus, also known as a variant of the Lathyrus gorgoni species, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus gorgoni subsp. tiriopolitanus include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in teas, infusions, or as a powder, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
